result.summary: Found 2 visual layout issues: one noticeable clipped navigation label and one partially cut-off carousel content area on the right edge.

issues.description: The top category tab on the right is cut off, showing only "Hot Ga..." instead of the full label, which makes the navigation look truncated.
issues.suggestion: Give the category row more horizontal space, reduce tab widths/font size, or make the row scrollable so full labels remain visible.

issues.description: Several game tiles on the right side of the content sections are partially clipped by the viewport edge, making the grid look unfinished.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the card container padding or spacing so the visible cards align cleanly within the screen, or clearly present the section as a horizontally scrollable carousel.
